---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
Clearly describe the feature or improvement you want.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
What problem are you facing right now?
Why is this feature needed?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?
(Example: new command, UI change, AI improvement, etc.)

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches or ideas you thought of?

## 📱 Example Usage (if applicable)
Example:
- "split 500 food with 2 people"
- "weekly summary"

## 🧠 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references.
